case_title: ALEXANDRIA ANDERSON VS. ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC.

REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF(EXHIBITS ARE ALSO FOR CSM-21-865075)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDRESEN, ALEXANDRIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC. $2,688.32 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,778.32, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JON DE URIARTE (REGIONAL DIRECTOR). PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
